description: Create a GitHub Actions C/C++ CI workflow for Cli that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-latest, macos-12, and windows-2022), compilers (llvm-13.0.0, gcc-11, and msvc), generators (Ninja and Visual Studio), and build types (Release and Debug). For each job, check out the code, set up C/C++ dependencies, install required packages, configure CMake, build the project, and run tests.
